lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: You gathered those silverleaf sprigs for the sick girl, didn't you?

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: Her mother paid well. Don't mistake profit for kindness, idealist.

lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: You helped anyway. That's what matters to me, Finn.

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: One decent act doesn't prove your optimism. But... it was the right thing.
